---
name: Rule change
about: A Hattrick mechanic has changed and the skill content needs updating
title: "[Rule change] "
labels: rule-change
---

## What changed

Brief description of the rule change.

## Source

Link to the Hattrick announcement (devblog, news item, forum post, wiki page). Multiple sources welcome.

- Devblog / news URL:
- Forum thread / wiki URL (optional):
- Date the change took effect:

## Where in the skill this affects

Which file(s) and section(s) need updating. Quoting the current text helps.

- File: e.g. `skills/hattrick/SKILL.md`
- Section: e.g. "## 1. TRAINING & PLAYER DEVELOPMENT > ### Core Mechanics"
- Current text: ...

## Suggested update (optional)

If you have a proposed replacement text, paste it here. If not, leave blank and the maintainer or another contributor will draft it.

## Additional context

Anything else relevant (community discussion, edge cases, conflicting reports).
